operator_queue.title: Social Security Amendments of 1965
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Greatly expanded health insurance access and became central to reducing racial gaps in medical coverage and care, especially through Medicaid and later expansions tied to it.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Enforcement Act of 1871 (Second Enforcement Act)
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Allowed federal supervision of elections in areas with suppression.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Post-9/11 GI Bill
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Expanded educational and wealth-building opportunities for a new generation of veterans, including many Black veterans, though differences in school quality, debt, labor markets, and family wealth still shaped how fully those benefits translated into long-run gains.
operator_queue.categories: Business and Economics, Education, Military and Veterans
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Honoring our PACT Act of 2022
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Broadened access to treatment and compensation for veterans with service-connected toxic exposure conditions, which matters for Black veterans as part of a larger struggle over equal recognition, care, and support after service.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Healthy Start Initiative
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Targeted maternal and infant health resources toward high-risk communities, which has mattered disproportionately for Black mothers and infants because of persistent racial gaps in mortality, prenatal care, and postpartum support.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Enforcement Acts
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Provided federal legal tools to protect elections and prosecute rights violations.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Smith v. Allwright
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Significantly increased Black voter participation in Southern states.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Browder v. Gayle
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Ended bus segregation in Montgomery and validated the constitutional claims behind the bus boycott.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Allen v. State Board of Elections
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Broadened federal oversight over discriminatory election practices.
operator_queue.operator_next_step: Use impact curate-policy-intent with this policy_id, a supported source/reference, a neutral intent summary, and a category.

operator_queue.title: Emergency Medical Treatment and Active Labor Act
operator_queue.outcome_summary: Strengthened the right to emergency care and reduced the formal ability of hospitals to refuse urgent patients, which has been especially consequential for low-income Black patients and pregnant Black women navigating unequal healthcare systems.
